mapper.update: UPDATE public."MonitoringPoints" SET "IsDelete" = true, "DeletedAt" = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE "MonitoringPointID" = #{monitoringPointID}
UPDATE public."MonitoringPoints" SET "IsDelete" = false, "DeletedAt" = NULL WHERE "MonitoringPointID" = #{monitoringPointID}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM public."MonitoringPoints" WHERE "IsDelete" = true AND "DeletedAt" IS NOT NULL AND "DeletedAt" < #{cutoff}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM public."MonitoringPoints" m INNER JOIN public."SoilDatas" s ON m."MonitoringPointID" = s."MonitoringPointID" WHERE m."IsDelete" = false AND s."IsDelete" = false AND s."SoilAttribute" = #{soilAttribute}::soil_parameters AND s."Value" >= #{minValue} AND s."Value" < #{maxValue}

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM public."MonitoringPoints" m INNER JOIN public."WeatherDatas" w ON m."MonitoringPointID" = w."MonitoringPointID" WHERE m."IsDelete" = false AND w."IsDelete" = false AND w."WeatherType" = #{weatherType}::weather_data_type AND w."Value" >= #{minValue} AND w."Value" < #{maxValue}

SELECT * FROM public."MonitoringPoints" WHERE "IsDelete" = false
AND "CountyDistrict" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{countyDistrict}, '%')
AND "Town" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{town}, '%')
AND "Village" LIKE CONCAT('%', #{village}, '%')

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM public."MonitoringPoints" m INNER JOIN public."TobaccoLeafDatas" t ON m."MonitoringPointID" = t."MonitoringPointID" WHERE m."IsDelete" = false AND t."IsDelete" = false AND t."TobaccoLeafData" = #{tobaccoLeafData}::tobacco_leaf_data_enum AND t."Value" >= #{minValue} AND t."Value" < #{maxValue}

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM public."MonitoringPoints" m INNER JOIN public."SanMingTobaccoFieldsBasicDatas" s ON m."MonitoringPointID" = s."MonitoringPointID" WHERE m."IsDelete" = false AND s."IsDelete" = false AND s."PlantingArea" >= #{minValue} AND s."PlantingArea" < #{maxValue}

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM public."MonitoringPoints" m INNER JOIN public."SanMingTobaccoFieldsBasicDatas" s ON m."MonitoringPointID" = s."MonitoringPointID" WHERE m."IsDelete" = false AND s."IsDelete" = false AND s."PlannedContractAmount" >= #{minValue} AND s."PlannedContractAmount" < #{maxValue}

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM public."MonitoringPoints" m INNER JOIN public."SanMingTobaccoFieldsBasicDatas" s ON m."MonitoringPointID" = s."MonitoringPointID" WHERE m."IsDelete" = false AND s."IsDelete" = false AND s."PurchaseQuantity" >= #{minValue} AND s."PurchaseQuantity" < #{maxValue}
